para.name: scope
para.heading: SCOPE
para.text: Standards and controls for all City business cards are part of the City's Forms Control Program (developed and administered by the Administrative Manual Section of the Department of Finance). These standards and controls are enacted in order to effect maximum monetary savings and to present a unified progressive image for the City.

para.name: specifications
para.heading: SPECIFICATIONS
para.text: All business cards will be printed using recycled paper in accordance with the following specifications.
Stock: 65% WHITE-LINEN FINISH PRINTING: FLAT OFFSET PRINTING (NO ENGRAVING,
INK: PMS #456 GREEN LAYOUT: ONLY THE LAYOUT SHOWN IN AM-508-2-1

para.name: who-may-have-cards
para.heading: WHO MAY HAVE CARDS
para.text: Business cards may only be authorized for those employees who have a definite need and legitimate requirement for cards in the performance of their duties. Agency Heads are responsible for determining which employees qualify for cards.

para.name: quantity
para.heading: QUANTITY
para.text: The quantity of business cards to be printed is limited to a maximum and minimum order of 250 cards per person.

para.name: ordering-cards
para.heading: ORDERING CARDS
para.text: To order business cards, submit a properly completed BUSINESS CARD LAYOUT (28-1448-5098) {AM-508-2-1} and a PURCHASE REQUISITION (28-1448-5123) {AM-301-1-1} to the Digital Document Division (Print Shop). See AM-508-2-1 for details.
Petty cash funds {AM-401-1} or DIRECT PAYMENT ORDERS (D.P.O's) {AM-303-1} may not be used to obtain business cards; such methods of payment will not be honored.
